headline: 3 Reasons EL is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Estée Lauder’s stock price fell to $89.27. Shareholders have lost 5.7% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 10.9%. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
